data.title: California Fines Nexo $500K Over Unlicensed Crypto Loans
data.description:
Nexo has been fined $500,000 by California regulators for issuing thousands of unlicensed crypto-backed loans.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/california-fines-nexo-500k-over-unlicensed-crypto-loans/

data.title: State Street rolls out new crypto tokenization tools
data.description:
State Street said its new crypto platform would help clients build tokenized money market funds, exchange-traded funds, and products such as tokenized deposits and stablecoins.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/state-street-rolls-out-tokenization-platform?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Texas-Based Homebuilder Megatel Homes Receives SEC Nod to Issue Crypto Rewards
data.description:
Texas-based Megatel Homes has launched a crypto payments and rewards token dubbed “MegPrime,” after receiving a “no-action” letter from the SEC.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/texas-based-homebuilder-megatel-homes-receives-sec-nod-to-issue-crypto-rewards/

data.title: DDC Enterprise, a US-listed company, completed an acquisition of 200 BTC, bringing its total holdings to 1383 BTC.
data.description: DDC Enterprise Limited, a US-listed company, announced the completion of its first Bitcoin purchase of 2026, acquiring an additional 200 BTC. Following the transaction, DDC's total Bitcoin holdings increased to 1,383 BTC. The announcement shows that DDC's current average Bitcoin holding cost is approximately $88,998, representing a 16.9% return over the current period. Each 1,000 DDC shares corresponds to approximately 0.046482 BTC. The company stated that this purchase continues its prudent and disciplined capital allocation strategy, viewing Bitcoin as a strategic reserve asset commensurate with long-term value creation. Norma Chu, founder, chairman, and CEO of DDC, stated that this transaction demonstrates the company's commitment to its Bitcoin reserve strategy within its governance and risk management framework. Despite cautious short-term market sentiment, the company believes the current environment is favorable for long-term positioning. (Business Wire)

data.title: DDC Enterprise Increases Bitcoin Holdings with Recent Purchase
data.description: According to PANews, U.S.-listed company DDC Enterprise announced on January 15 that it has acquired an additional 200 BTC. This marks the company's first Bitcoin purchase of 2026, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to 1,383 BTC. As of now, the company's Bitcoin investment has yielded a return of 16.9%.

data.title: U.S. Justice Department Investigates Federal Reserve Chair Powell
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the U.S. Department of Justice has initiated a criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. This development has raised concerns among global central banks about the potential impact on the Federal Reserve's independence. The investigation not only affects the direction of U.S. monetary policy but also poses a direct threat to a critical tool in the global financial system—currency swap agreements. Analysts have pointed out that if the U.S. ties these swap agreements to geopolitical interests, the global capacity to respond to crises could face significant challenges.

data.title: Sol Meme's GAS token surged over 370% intraday, pushing its market capitalization above $30 million.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of GAS, the Solana ecosystem's Meme coin, surged by over 370% intraday, briefly exceeding $30 million before settling back to approximately $33.3 million. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: Nexo Fined $500,000 for Unlicensed Crypto Loans in California
data.description:
California's DFPI fines Nexo $500,000 for unlicensed crypto-backed loans affecting 5,456 residents. Nexo faces strict regulatory measures for U. S. market re-entry.
source: https://coincu.com/news/nexo-fined-unlicensed-loans-california/

data.title: Ethereum Experiences Slight Decline Against USDT
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Ethereum's price against USDT is currently reported at $3,305.42, reflecting a 0.11% decrease over the past 24 hours.

data.title: Advice for Aspiring Crypto Enthusiasts
data.description:
CyrilXBT posted on X. In a recent post, CyrilXBT shared insights from his personal journey of leaving a traditional 9-to-5 job in his early 20s to pursue a career in cryptocurrency, with the goal of becoming a millionaire by his 30s. He offered several pieces of advice for those starting out in the crypto world.

Firstly, he emphasized the importance of learning how to trade and understanding market cycles. Building an audience on platforms like TikTok, X, YouTube, or Instagram is also crucial, especially if it aligns with one's passions.

Networking is highlighted as a key factor for success, along with providing value within one's niche. CyrilXBT stressed that having passion for one's work is essential, as it serves as motivation during challenging times.

He encouraged aspiring individuals to persist in their efforts, suggesting that success will eventually follow. CyrilXBT concluded with a motivational note, expressing his support for those aiming to achieve greatness by 2026.

data.title: Solana's Price Surge Following December Predictions
data.description: Santiment posted on X that Solana has experienced an 18% increase in value since mid-December, following predictions by CryptoCurb regarding its price bottom. The timing of these predictions has been noted as well-executed, contributing to the recent positive performance of Solana.

data.title: X’s Creator Rewards Favor Posts Over AI Comment Exposure, Sparking Debate
data.description: A new discussion has emerged on X (formerly Twitter) over how its creator reward system treats AI-generated replies in comment sections.Crypto commentator 0xTodd noted that X’s current monetization structure primarily rewards original posts, rather than the reach or engagement generated through replies and comments—even when those comments attract significant visibility.

data.title: InfoFi App Generates Significant Revenue from Enterprise API Access
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Nikita Bier, the product lead for X and advisor to the Solana ecosystem, stated that the InfoFi application has already generated millions of dollars from enterprise-level API access. Bier expressed that they do not desire this money.Previously, ChainCatcher reported that X had revoked API access for applications that reward users for posting.

data.title: Injective's Proposal to Double INJ Token Deflation Rate Reaches Quorum
data.description: According to PANews, Injective announced on the X platform that the governance proposal IIP-617, aimed at doubling the deflation rate of INJ tokens, has reached the quorum required for voting. The proposal is designed to increase the deflation rate of INJ tokens, and stakeholders have four more days to cast their votes. The proposal has already met the participation conditions necessary for approval.

data.title: Nearly 80% of the exclusive projects listed on Gate.com in 2025 closed higher within 30 minutes of opening, with a median increase of approximately 81%.
data.description: Gate Research released "Key Data on Spot Listings in Gate 2025," based on a sample of 447 new assets newly listed on Gate spot in 2025, analyzing market feedback over multiple time windows from 5 minutes to 30 days after listing. The report points out that in a market environment of high volatility and high supply, for trading platforms, listing new assets is not just about covering more assets, but also tests the platform's comprehensive capabilities in project selection, liquidity organization, transaction handling, and price discovery efficiency. In terms of supply structure, Gate listed 447 new assets in spot in 2025, including 318 initial offerings (including 28 exclusive offerings) and 129 non-initial offerings, with initial offerings accounting for approximately 71%. New supply throughout the year was mainly comprised of initial offerings. Regarding first-day performance, approximately 54.8% of assets closed higher within 24 hours, with the average 24-hour increase for the rising sample being approximately 635%. The breakdown by asset type shows that initial public offerings (IPOs) had higher median returns in the early trading window: the median gain for the entire sample of IPOs within a 24-hour window was 12.56% (excluding extreme cases, 8.03%), significantly higher than the 1.18% for non-IPOs (excluding extreme cases, 0.86%). Exclusive projects showed more concentrated early performance: nearly 80% (22/28) closed higher within the first 30 minutes, with a median gain of approximately 81%, and over one-third of exclusive projects achieved a gain of ≥100% within 30 minutes. Looking at the trajectories of representative projects, Gate's IPO system covers various asset types, including traffic-driven, technology-driven, and community-driven assets, with numerous examples of gains exceeding tenfold, reflecting Gate's efficiency in selecting high-profile assets, its speed in executing IPOs, and its liquidity absorption capacity.

data.title: Bitcoin Spot ETFs Experience Significant Net Inflows and Outflows
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from SoSoValue indicates that Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $100 million yesterday. The Blackrock ETF IBIT recorded the highest single-day net inflow of $316 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $63.426 billion. The Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF BTC followed with a single-day net inflow of $6.7399 million, accumulating a historical total net inflow of $1.951 billion. Conversely, the Fidelity ETF FBTC experienced the largest single-day net outflow of $189 million, with its historical total net inflow reaching $12.122 billion. As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs stands at $125.177 billion, with an ETF net asset ratio of 6.58% compared to the total market capitalization of Bitcoin. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $58.217 billion.

data.title: FHE broke through 0.115 USDT, surging over 60% intraday.
data.description: According to GMGN data, FHE rose rapidly during the day, with the price once breaking through 0.115 USDT, a maximum increase of over 60%, before falling back to approximately 0.099 USDT.
